objective: Design and implement a 'Wants vs Needs' tracking tab within the Symphony Routine App.

active_thoughts: The user wants a dedicated UI to track purchases/desires, categorized strictly by 'Needs' vs 'Wants'.
Needs must include a 'Why', directly tying back to health/DNA data (e.g., Water Flosser -> Plaque/Bloodstream prevention).
There must also be an 'AI Advice/Commentary' section where Athena can weigh in on these items.
UI Strategy: A new tab in `index.html`. A 3-column layout might work best: Column 1 (Needs), Column 2 (Wants), Column 3 (Athena's Assessment).
